title: Garlicky Crunchy Greek Lamb Skewers
description: A flavorful and crunchy Greek dish featuring lamb skewers with a garlicky twist, perfect for a brunch mood. The addition of peanut cookies adds a unique texture and flavor combination.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto the soaked wooden skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Sprinkle the crushed peanut cookies over the lamb skewers, pressing gently to adhere.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the lamb is cooked to an internal temperature of 145°F.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the Garlicky Crunchy Greek Lamb Skewers hot, garnished with fresh parsley or oregano if desired.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for later use.
